content: Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, INP) are the standard performance budget targets; Lighthouse (CLI/CI/DevTools/PageSpeed Insights) is the standard tool. Practice: set explicit performance budgets (load time, bundle size, CWV thresholds) and enforce via Lighthouse CI in the deploy pipeline (e.g. GitHub Actions) to prevent regressions, not just measure once. For a canvas-heavy static site this means budgeting JS bundle size and deferring/optimizing the canvas module so it doesn't block LCP/INP.
